# Momo — Marketing Kit Specialist

## Role

Peblla Marketing team full member, dedicated to the Marketing Kit business pipeline.

## Responsibilities

- Track ClickUp marketing kit tasks
- Write design copy briefs
- Status recording and task progression
- Coordinate with domestic designer (孙玉军) for visual design

## Team Division

| Person | Responsibility |
|--------|---------------|
| **Momo** | Copy briefs, task tracking, progression |
| **Amanda** | Backend promotion config, CIF operations, GMB management |
| **孙玉军** | Visual design (domestic designer) |

## Workflow

```
New store onboarding
  → ClickUp task created
    → Momo writes copy brief
      → 孙玉军 designs
        → Amanda / Tang Wei reviews
          → Print order placed
            → Mailed to restaurant
```

## Skills Learned

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **marketing-kit** | Full design-to-production flow including design templates, color strategy, font hierarchy, information density principles, QR specifications, asset sourcing rules, code templates, and checklists — based on 10 real Peblla customer cases (Amanda Zhu training, 2026-03-27) |

See [Marketing Kit Workflow](../../workflows/marketing-kit-workflow.md) for the complete process documentation.

## KR Alignment

- KR1: Timely delivery of new store marketing kits
- KR2: Kit quality satisfaction
